title: About | Your Business
description: A business-site starter About page focused on company context, values, and approach.
heroTitle: Explain the business without making people decode it
heroText: Use this page to explain who is behind the work, why the business exists, and how it approaches clients, delivery, and quality.

cards.title: What the business is
cards.text: Summarise the business model, team shape, or founder story clearly and without filler.

cards.title: How work is done
cards.text: Use this space to explain the delivery style, communication standards, or practical way the business works.

cards.title: What matters most
cards.text: State the values or operating principles that actually shape the service, not generic slogans.
